title: Off-by-one – age check should use >=
diff_patch:
--- a/auth/access_control.py
+++ b/auth/access_control.py
@@ -3,6 +3,6 @@
 def check_age_access(user_age):
-    if user_age > 18:
+    if user_age >= 18:
         allow_access()
     else:
         deny_access()
expected_patch:
if user_age >= 18:
    allow_access()

title: Wrong comparison operator – assignment inside condition
diff_patch:
--- a/core/validator.py
+++ b/core/validator.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 def is_admin(role):
-    if role = 'admin':
+    if role == 'admin':
         return True
     return False
expected_patch:
if role == 'admin':
    return True

title: Infinite loop – loop variable never updated
diff_patch:
--- a/workers/task_runner.py
+++ b/workers/task_runner.py
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
 def process_queue(queue):
     i = 0
     while i < len(queue):
         process(queue[i])
+        # missing: i += 1

title: Mutable default argument trap
diff_patch:
--- a/utils/helpers.py
+++ b/utils/helpers.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-def append_item(item, lst=[]):
+def append_item(item, lst=None):
+    if lst is None:
+        lst = []
     lst.append(item)
     return lst

title: Incorrect string formatting – missing %s argument
diff_patch:
--- a/notifications/email.py
+++ b/notifications/email.py
@@ -2,5 +2,5 @@
 def send_welcome(user):
-    msg = "Hello %s, welcome!" % ()
+    msg = "Hello %s, welcome!" % (user.name,)
     send(msg)
expected_patch: msg = "Hello %s, welcome!" % (user.name,)

title: Clean API endpoint refactor
SQL injection vulnerability – raw string query
diff_patch:
--- a/db/queries.py
+++ b/db/queries.py
@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@
 def get_user(username):
-    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{username}'"
+    query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = %s"
+    cursor.execute(query, (username,))
expected_patch:
query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = %s"
cursor.execute(query, (username,))

title: Missing null check before attribute access
diff_patch:
--- a/services/profile.py
+++ b/services/profile.py
@@ -2,5 +2,7 @@
 def get_display_name(user):
-    return user.profile.display_name
+    if user and user.profile:
+        return user.profile.display_name
+    return "Anonymous"

title: Off-by-one in batch slicing
diff_patch:
--- a/training/batch.py
+++ b/training/batch.py
@@ -3,6 +3,6 @@
 def get_batch(rows, batch_size):
-    return rows[:batch_size-1]
+    return rows[:batch_size]
expected_patch: return rows[:batch_size]

title: Mutable default argument in feature cache
diff_patch:
--- a/features/cache.py
+++ b/features/cache.py
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
-def add_feature(name, cache={}):
-    cache[name] = True
-    return cache
+def add_feature(name, cache=None):
+    if cache is None:
+        cache = {}
+    cache[name] = True
+    return cache

-    if split = 'train':

expected_patch:
if split == 'train':

title: Null check missing for model before predict
diff_patch:
--- a/inference/predictor.py
+++ b/inference/predictor.py
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 def predict(model, x):
-    return model.predict(x)
+    if model is None:

title: Off-by-one in sliding window
diff_patch:
--- a/features/window.py
+++ b/features/window.py
@@ -2,5 +2,5 @@
 def windows(xs, size):
-    for i in range(0, len(xs) - size):
+    for i in range(0, len(xs) - size + 1):
         yield xs[i:i+size]
expected_patch: for i in range(0, len(xs) - size + 1):
